mechanism: Broad spectrum tyrosine kinase inhibition (including FLT3) to block proliferation
additional_notes: Reported activity in FLT3‑ITD models. Suggested 1 µM top (10‑point, 3×). Expected low‑to‑mid nM to 100s nM.

mechanism: Inhibits the 26S proteasome, leading to accumulation of misfolded proteins and apoptosis
additional_notes: Used clinically in hematologic malignancies; suggested 1 µM top (10‑point, 3×). Expected IC50 in low‑to‑mid nM range.

mechanism: Irreversibly inhibits the proteasome to induce apoptosis
additional_notes: Potent proteasome inhibitor with AML activity in preclinical models. Suggested 1 µM top (10‑point, 3×). Expected low nM IC50.

mechanism: Inhibits histone deacetylases broadly, altering gene expression and inducing cell death
additional_notes: Epigenetic agent with anti‑AML in vitro activity. Suggested 1 µM top (10‑point, 3×). Expected IC50 ~10–200 nM.

mechanism: Selective inhibition of class I HDACs to modulate transcription and sensitize cells to other agents
additional_notes: Reported AML activity and synergy with other drugs. Suggested 3 µM top (10‑point, 3×). Expected IC50 ~100 nM–1 µM.

category: Aurora A kinase inhibitor (mitotic kinase inhibitor)
mechanism: Inhibits Aurora A kinase, disrupting mitosis and promoting cell death
additional_notes: Active in AML preclinical studies. Suggested 1 µM top (10‑point, 3×). Expected IC50 ~10–500 nM.

mechanism: Inhibits CDK4/6 to block cell‑cycle progression from G1 to S phase
additional_notes: Top conc. 10 µM (10‑point, 3×). Activity in subsets of AML; expected IC50 often >100 nM (sometimes µM).

mechanism: Inhibits MEK1/2 to block MAPK signaling downstream of RAS/RAF
additional_notes: Useful for RAS/MAPK‑activated AMLs. Suggested 1 µM top (10‑point, 3×). Expected IC50 low‑to‑mid nM to ~100 nM depending on context.

mechanism: Irreversible inhibition of BTK and TEC family kinases; has reported off‑targets relevant to AML
additional_notes: BTK inhibitors show some preclinical AML activity. Suggested 3 µM top (10‑point, 3×). Expected IC50 ~100 nM–1 µM.

mechanism: Inhibits SRC family kinases, ABL and other kinases to disrupt proliferative signaling
additional_notes: Multi‑kinase inhibitor with reported AML activity. Suggested 1 µM top (10‑point, 3×). Expected IC50 ~1–500 nM.

mechanism: Inhibits mTORC1, suppressing mTOR pathway–driven growth and metabolism
additional_notes: mTOR pathway implicated in AML; suggested 10 µM top (10‑point, 3×) for broad coverage. Expected IC50 ~10–1000 nM.

mechanism: Binds tubulin, disrupts microtubules and triggers apoptosis
additional_notes: Repurposing candidate with preclinical antileukemia activity. Suggested 10 µM top (10‑point, 3×). Expected IC50 ~100 nM–5 µM (variable).
